recommendations.title: Cash economy at $375
recommendations.subtitle: Finnair • 1 stop
details: 🏆 Cash wins — best award is only 0¢/pt, save points for a better route

insights.title: 💡 Look for: Flying Blue business
insights.detail: Flying Blue J to Europe is one of the best sweet spots. 50-55K one-way on AF/KLM metal. (up to 55,000 pts, ~7¢/pt)

insights.title: 💡 Look for: Flying Blue economy
insights.detail: Flying Blue Y to Europe at 15-22K is solid value, especially on promo. (up to 22,000 pts, ~2.7¢/pt)

insights.title: 💡 Look for: Aeroplan business
insights.detail: Aeroplan J to Europe on Star Alliance (Lufthansa, Swiss, Turkish, LOT). 60-70K standard. (up to 70,000 pts, ~6.5¢/pt)

routeSweetSpots.description: Flying Blue J to Europe is one of the best sweet spots. 50-55K one-way on AF/KLM metal.
Flying Blue Y to Europe at 15-22K is solid value, especially on promo.
Aeroplan J to Europe on Star Alliance (Lufthansa, Swiss, Turkish, LOT). 60-70K standard.
Delta One booked via Virgin Atlantic. 50K OW when available.
Delta One flash sales to Europe — 60-80K when they appear.

warnings: ⚠️ Chase UR → Emirates Skywards transfers ENDED Oct 2025
⚠️ Virgin Atlantic does NOT book Emirates flights
⚠️ Alaska only has 47,660 — enough for ~1 business OW or 1 economy RT
